reasons: Selena's Abyssal Arrow can create the first stun window for Saber to safely commit.
Saber's burst turns Selena's long-range catch into a fast kill.

proof.summary: Selena catches or marks the target from range, then Saber follows with single-target burst before the target can escape.
worksBestWhen: Selena lands a meaningful stun duration.
Saber waits near the expected catch zone.
failureCases: Saber dives before Selena confirms the target.
The enemy target has nearby peel or immunity.

reasons: Selena's arrow stun gives Eudora time to walk into range and layer her burst combo.
Eudora adds reliable magic burst after Selena creates the opening.

proof.summary: Selena starts the pickoff with a ranged stun, while Eudora extends the control and finishes with magic burst.
worksBestWhen: Eudora keeps burst cooldowns ready for confirmed arrows.
failureCases: Eudora is too far away after the arrow lands.
Selena catches a tank or bait target.
The enemy cleans up Selena or Eudora after the combo.

reasons: Selena's stun can hold a target long enough for Kadita's delayed knock-up to connect.
Kadita brings burst follow-up that fits Selena's pickoff-first game plan.

proof.summary: Selena creates the first control hit, while Kadita layers delayed area control and burst on the trapped target.
worksBestWhen: Kadita is already moving before Selena's arrow lands.
Selena uses traps or vision to predict the target path.
failureCases: Kadita arrives late after the stun ends.
The target is hit at a range Kadita cannot reach.
Enemy allies interrupt Kadita's combo entry.

reasons: Selena's traps and arrow pressure can reveal or control areas where Aldous wants to choose a target.
Aldous can use the information and control window from Selena to chase a vulnerable enemy.

proof.summary: Selena improves map control and catch reliability, while Aldous uses that information to commit to a global pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Selena traps enemy rotation paths before Aldous commits.
Aldous targets a hero already pressured or isolated by Selena.
failureCases: Aldous ults before Selena confirms target safety.
Selena's traps are cleared or avoided.
The enemy groups around Aldous's landing point.

reasons: Selena's traps can help control bushes and approach paths for Franco hook angles.
Selena's arrow stun can make Franco's hook or suppression follow-up easier to execute.

proof.summary: Selena creates vision and long-range control, while Franco adds displacement or suppression to finish the pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Selena and Franco control the same jungle corridor.
Franco follows only after Selena confirms the target path.
failureCases: Franco hooks a tank instead of Selena's intended target.
Selena and Franco overlap control on different targets.
